title: Mpiexec.exe
html:
Mpiexec.exe

Command-line tool for running Message Passing Interface (MPI) applications.

Execute

Executes commands under a trusted, Microsoft signed binary.

mpiexec.exe {CMD}

Executes a command via MPI command-line tool. — MITRE: T1127 — Privileges: User
